target.queryText:
SELECT  
  'PV-Fenster' as text,
  cast(strftime('%s', timestamp, 'utc') as integer) *1000 as zeitfenster_start,
  cast(strftime('%s', timestamp, 'utc', '+3 hours') as integer) *1000 as zeitfenster_end
FROM pv_window
 WHERE pv_next_peak > (SELECT value FROM meta_config WHERE key='pv_threshold') and datetime(timestamp) >= datetime('now', 'localtime') and
        (strftime('%F %T', timestamp) between datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime') and datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime'))
        ORDER BY timestamp asc, pv_next_peak DESC
 Limit 1
;
target.rawQueryText:
SELECT  
  'PV-Fenster' as text,
  cast(strftime('%s', timestamp, 'utc') as integer) *1000 as zeitfenster_start,
  cast(strftime('%s', timestamp, 'utc', '+3 hours') as integer) *1000 as zeitfenster_end
FROM pv_window
 WHERE pv_next_peak > (SELECT value FROM meta_config WHERE key='pv_threshold') and datetime(timestamp) >= datetime('now', 'localtime') and
        (strftime('%F %T', timestamp) between datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime') and datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime'))
        ORDER BY timestamp asc, pv_next_peak DESC
 Limit 1
;

targets.queryText:
WITH cfg AS (
    SELECT
        MAX(CASE WHEN key='solar_threshold' THEN CAST(value AS REAL) END) AS solar_threshold,
        MAX(CASE WHEN key='min_solar_buffer_threshold' THEN CAST(value AS REAL) END) AS min_buffer,
        MAX(CASE WHEN key='solar_buffer_threshold' THEN CAST(value AS REAL) END) AS max_buffer
    FROM meta_config
),
buf AS (
    SELECT buffer_temp
    FROM system_snapshot
    ORDER BY timestamp_mez DESC
    LIMIT 1
)

SELECT 
    strftime('%F %H:00:00', d.timestamp),

    CASE
        WHEN d.radiation > cfg.solar_threshold
         AND buf.buffer_temp BETWEEN cfg.min_buffer AND cfg.max_buffer
        THEN 'WAIT_SOLAR'
        ELSE d.action
    END AS decision

FROM decision_logic d
CROSS JOIN cfg
CROSS JOIN buf

WHERE strftime('%F %H:00:00','now','localtime','+1 hour')
      = strftime('%F %H:00:00', d.timestamp);
targets.rawQueryText:
WITH cfg AS (
    SELECT
        MAX(CASE WHEN key='solar_threshold' THEN CAST(value AS REAL) END) AS solar_threshold,
        MAX(CASE WHEN key='min_solar_buffer_threshold' THEN CAST(value AS REAL) END) AS min_buffer,
        MAX(CASE WHEN key='solar_buffer_threshold' THEN CAST(value AS REAL) END) AS max_buffer
    FROM meta_config
),
buf AS (
    SELECT buffer_temp
    FROM system_snapshot
    ORDER BY timestamp_mez DESC
    LIMIT 1
)

SELECT 
    strftime('%F %H:00:00', d.timestamp),

    CASE
        WHEN d.radiation > cfg.solar_threshold
         AND buf.buffer_temp BETWEEN cfg.min_buffer AND cfg.max_buffer
        THEN 'WAIT_SOLAR'
        ELSE d.action
    END AS decision

FROM decision_logic d
CROSS JOIN cfg
CROSS JOIN buf

WHERE strftime('%F %H:00:00','now','localtime','+1 hour')
      = strftime('%F %H:00:00', d.timestamp);
targets.rawSql: SELECT action FROM decision_logic ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1;

strftime('%d.%m.%Y', 'now', 'localtime') as Datum,
strftime('%R','now','localtime') AS Zeit
targets.rawQueryText:

strftime('%d.%m.%Y', 'now', 'localtime') as Datum,

targets.queryText:
WITH current_action AS (
    SELECT action
    FROM decision_logic
    WHERE datetime(timestamp) >= datetime('now','localtime')
    ORDER BY datetime(timestamp)
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
'neue mögliche Aktion voraussichtlich am   '|| strftime('%d.%m.%Y', datetime(timestamp), '-1 hour') || ' nach ' || strftime(' %H:%M', datetime(timestamp), '-1 hour') || ' Uhr'
FROM decision_logic
WHERE datetime(timestamp) > datetime('now','localtime')
  AND action <> (SELECT action FROM current_action)
ORDER BY datetime(timestamp)
LIMIT 1
targets.rawQueryText:
WITH current_action AS (
    SELECT action
    FROM decision_logic
    WHERE datetime(timestamp) >= datetime('now','localtime')
    ORDER BY datetime(timestamp)
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
'neue mögliche Aktion voraussichtlich am   '|| strftime('%d.%m.%Y', datetime(timestamp), '-1 hour') || ' nach ' || strftime(' %H:%M', datetime(timestamp), '-1 hour') || ' Uhr'
FROM decision_logic
WHERE datetime(timestamp) > datetime('now','localtime')
  AND action <> (SELECT action FROM current_action)
ORDER BY datetime(timestamp)
LIMIT 1
targets.rawSql: SELECT action FROM decision_logic ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText:
WITH cfg AS (
    SELECT
        MAX(CASE WHEN key='solar_threshold' THEN CAST(value AS REAL) END) AS solar_threshold,
        MAX(CASE WHEN key='min_solar_buffer_threshold' THEN CAST(value AS REAL) END) AS min_buffer,
        MAX(CASE WHEN key='solar_buffer_threshold' THEN CAST(value AS REAL) END) AS max_buffer
    FROM meta_config
),
buf AS (
    SELECT buffer_temp
    FROM system_snapshot
    ORDER BY timestamp_mez DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
solar AS (
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN d.radiation > cfg.solar_threshold
             AND buf.buffer_temp BETWEEN cfg.min_buffer AND cfg.max_buffer
            THEN 1 ELSE 0
        END AS solar_active
    FROM decision_logic d
    CROSS JOIN cfg
    CROSS JOIN buf
    WHERE strftime('%F %H:00:00', 'now', 'localtime', '+1 hour')
          = strftime('%F %H:00:00', d.timestamp)
    LIMIT 1
),
decision AS (
    SELECT action
    FROM decision_logic
    WHERE strftime('%F %H:00:00', 'now', 'localtime', '+1 hour')
          = strftime('%F %H:00:00', timestamp)
)

SELECT
    col1,
    col2,
    col3,
    col4,
    col5
FROM (
    SELECT
        text1   AS col1,
        text2   AS col2,
        text3   AS col3,
        text4   AS col4,
        text5   AS col5,
        action
    FROM action_measures

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        content1 AS col1,
        content2 AS col2,
        content3 AS col3,
        content4 AS col4,
        content5 AS col5,
        action
    FROM action_measures
) am
CROSS JOIN solar
WHERE action = (SELECT action FROM decision)
  AND solar.solar_active = 0;
targets.rawQueryText:
WITH cfg AS (
    SELECT
        MAX(CASE WHEN key='solar_threshold' THEN CAST(value AS REAL) END) AS solar_threshold,
        MAX(CASE WHEN key='min_solar_buffer_threshold' THEN CAST(value AS REAL) END) AS min_buffer,
        MAX(CASE WHEN key='solar_buffer_threshold' THEN CAST(value AS REAL) END) AS max_buffer
    FROM meta_config
),
buf AS (
    SELECT buffer_temp
    FROM system_snapshot
    ORDER BY timestamp_mez DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
solar AS (
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN d.radiation > cfg.solar_threshold
             AND buf.buffer_temp BETWEEN cfg.min_buffer AND cfg.max_buffer
            THEN 1 ELSE 0
        END AS solar_active
    FROM decision_logic d
    CROSS JOIN cfg
    CROSS JOIN buf
    WHERE strftime('%F %H:00:00', 'now', 'localtime', '+1 hour')
          = strftime('%F %H:00:00', d.timestamp)
    LIMIT 1
),
decision AS (
    SELECT action
    FROM decision_logic
    WHERE strftime('%F %H:00:00', 'now', 'localtime', '+1 hour')
          = strftime('%F %H:00:00', timestamp)
)

SELECT
    col1,
    col2,
    col3,
    col4,
    col5
FROM (
    SELECT
        text1   AS col1,
        text2   AS col2,
        text3   AS col3,
        text4   AS col4,
        text5   AS col5,
        action
    FROM action_measures

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        content1 AS col1,
        content2 AS col2,
        content3 AS col3,
        content4 AS col4,
        content5 AS col5,
        action
    FROM action_measures
) am
CROSS JOIN solar
WHERE action = (SELECT action FROM decision)
  AND solar.solar_active = 0;

panels.title: Mögliche Maßnahmen (Wirkung von links nach rechts abnehmend)

targets.queryText:
SELECT  CAST(strftime('%s', time_start, 'utc') AS INTEGER) AS time,
       
    CASE
        WHEN action = 'HEAT_NOW' THEN '1 HEAT_NOW'
        WHEN action = 'HEAT_MIDDAY' THEN NULL
        WHEN action = 'REDUCE' THEN NULL
        WHEN action = 'STABLE' THEN NULL
        END as '       '
    from aktions_zustaende
    where installation_id = 1234567 and 
          datetime(time_start) >= datetime('now', 'localtime') 
order by time_start asc
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT  CAST(strftime('%s', time_start, 'utc') AS INTEGER) AS time,
       
    CASE
        WHEN action = 'HEAT_NOW' THEN '1 HEAT_NOW'
        WHEN action = 'HEAT_MIDDAY' THEN NULL
        WHEN action = 'REDUCE' THEN NULL
        WHEN action = 'STABLE' THEN NULL
        END as '       '
    from aktions_zustaende
    where installation_id = ${anlage_id} and 
          datetime(time_start) >= datetime('now', 'localtime') 
order by time_start asc
targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp as time, pv_kw as value FROM pv_estimate ORDER BY timestamp;

SELECT datetime(timestamp), datetime('now', 'localtime'),
        temp_12h - temp_now as date_diff
        FROM weather_forecast
        where datetime(timestamp) >=  datetime('now', 'localtime')
        ORDER BY timestamp ASC
        LIMIT 1

targets.queryText:
SELECT 
(select value from meta_config where key = 'temp_verlust_gebaeude') *
(select value from meta_config where key = 'comfort_time_reference_value')
/
cooling_rate
as comfort_time,
'Std.' as text
from cooling_rate
 where datetime(timestamp) >=  datetime('now', 'localtime')
        ORDER BY timestamp ASC
        LIMIT 1

targets.queryText:
SELECT strftime('%F %T', timestamp), datetime(1776642015706/1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime
'),
  strftime('%d.%m.%Y %H:%M', timestamp) as Zeitfenster,
  pv_kw as 'Wert'
 FROM pv_window
        WHERE pv_next_peak > (SELECT value FROM meta_config WHERE key='pv_threshold') and datetime(timestamp) >= datetime('now', 'localtime') and 
        (strftime('%F %T', timestamp) between datetime(1776469215706/1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime') and datetime(1776642015706/1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime'))
        ORDER BY timestamp asc, pv_next_peak DESC
        LIMIT 1
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT strftime('%F %T', timestamp), datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime
'),
  strftime('%d.%m.%Y %H:%M', timestamp) as Zeitfenster,
  pv_kw as 'Wert'
 FROM pv_window
        WHERE pv_next_peak > (SELECT value FROM meta_config WHERE key='pv_threshold') and datetime(timestamp) >= datetime('now', 'localtime') and 
        (strftime('%F %T', timestamp) between datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime') and datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime'))
        ORDER BY timestamp asc, pv_next_peak DESC
        LIMIT 1

targets.queryText:
WITH start_window AS (
    SELECT timestamp
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            timestamp,
            MAX(pv_kw) OVER (
                ORDER BY timestamp
                ROWS BETWEEN CURRENT ROW AND 3 FOLLOWING
            ) AS pv_next_peak
        FROM pv_estimate
        WHERE datetime(timestamp) >= datetime('now','localtime')
          AND strftime('%F %T', timestamp) BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime') 
                                              AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime')
    )
    WHERE pv_next_peak > (SELECT value FROM meta_config WHERE key='pv_threshold')
    ORDER BY timestamp
    LIMIT 1
),

window_rows AS (
    SELECT timestamp, 
    pv_kw
    FROM pv_estimate
    WHERE timestamp >= (SELECT timestamp FROM start_window)
    ORDER BY timestamp
    LIMIT 4
),

pv_leistung as (
    select 
    sum(pv_kw) as pv_leistung_pv_window
    from window_rows
)

SELECT 
   (Select pv_leistung_pv_window from pv_leistung) as 'PV-Leistung',
   pv_kw AS Peak
   FROM window_rows
ORDER BY pv_kw DESC
LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText:
WITH start_window AS (
    SELECT timestamp
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            timestamp,
            MAX(pv_kw) OVER (
                ORDER BY timestamp
                ROWS BETWEEN CURRENT ROW AND 3 FOLLOWING
            ) AS pv_next_peak
        FROM pv_estimate
        WHERE datetime(timestamp) >= datetime('now','localtime')
          AND strftime('%F %T', timestamp) BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime') 
                                              AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime')
    )
    WHERE pv_next_peak > (SELECT value FROM meta_config WHERE key='pv_threshold')
    ORDER BY timestamp
    LIMIT 1
),

window_rows AS (
    SELECT timestamp, 
    pv_kw
    FROM pv_estimate
    WHERE timestamp >= (SELECT timestamp FROM start_window)
    ORDER BY timestamp
    LIMIT 4
),

pv_leistung as (
    select 
    sum(pv_kw) as pv_leistung_pv_window
    from window_rows
)

SELECT 
   (Select pv_leistung_pv_window from pv_leistung) as 'PV-Leistung',
   pv_kw AS Peak
   FROM window_rows
ORDER BY pv_kw DESC
LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText:
SELECT 
datetime(strftime('%F %T', timestamp)),
pv_kw / (SELECT value FROM meta_config WHERE key='pv_kwp') * 100 as Prozent
FROM pv_estimate
where datetime(strftime('%F %T', timestamp)) >= datetime('now', 'localtime')
ORDER BY timestamp asc
Limit 1

ORDER BY timestamp asc

targets.queryText:
SELECT timestamp, pv_kw,datetime('now', 'localtime'),
  strftime('%H:%M', timestamp) as Uhrzeit,
    pv_quality
FROM pv_logic
where datetime(strftime('%F %T', timestamp)) >= datetime('now', 'localtime')
order by timestamp asc
Limit 1
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT timestamp, pv_kw,datetime('now', 'localtime'),
  strftime('%H:%M', timestamp) as Uhrzeit,
    pv_quality
FROM pv_logic
where datetime(strftime('%F %T', timestamp)) >= datetime('now', 'localtime')
order by timestamp asc
Limit 1

targets.queryText:
SELECT timestamp, pv_kw,datetime('now', 'localtime'),
  strftime('%H:%M', timestamp) as Uhrzeit,
  radiation,
    case
        WHEN radiation > 300 THEN 'STRONG'
        WHEN radiation > 150 THEN 'WEAK'
        ELSE 'NONE'
        END AS radiation_quality
FROM pv_estimate
where datetime(strftime('%F %T', timestamp)) >= datetime('now', 'localtime')
order by timestamp asc
Limit 1
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT timestamp, pv_kw,datetime('now', 'localtime'),
  strftime('%H:%M', timestamp) as Uhrzeit,
  radiation,
    case
        WHEN radiation > 300 THEN 'STRONG'
        WHEN radiation > 150 THEN 'WEAK'
        ELSE 'NONE'
        END AS radiation_quality
FROM pv_estimate
where datetime(strftime('%F %T', timestamp)) >= datetime('now', 'localtime')
order by timestamp asc
Limit 1

   delta_12h as 'ΔT (12h)-Trend (Forecast)' 
   from weather_trend
where strftime('%F %H:00:00', timestamp) between datetime(1776488591852/1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime') 
      and datetime(1776661391852/1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime')

targets.queryText:
SELECT *
FROM (

    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT
            'ΔT (12h) Prognose aktuell' AS Parameter,
            COALESCE(printf('%.1f °C', temp_12h - temp_now), '0 °C') AS Wert,
            COALESCE('fällt um mehr als 3 Grad', '') AS Grenzwert
        FROM weather_forecast
        WHERE datetime(timestamp) >= datetime('now', 'localtime')
        ORDER BY timestamp ASC
        LIMIT 1
    )

    UNION ALL

    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT
            'ergänzende Informationen: ' AS Parameter,
            COALESCE(char(8203), '') AS Wert,
            COALESCE(char(8203), '') AS Grenzwert
        FROM pv_window
        WHERE pv_kw > (SELECT value FROM meta_config WHERE key='pv_threshold')
          AND datetime(timestamp) >= datetime('now', 'localtime')
        ORDER BY pv_next_peak DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )

    UNION ALL

    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT
            'Komfortzeit' AS Parameter,
            COALESCE(
                printf('%.1f',
                    (SELECT value FROM meta_config WHERE key='temp_verlust_gebaeude')
                    * (SELECT value FROM meta_config WHERE key='comfort_time_reference_value')
                    / COALESCE(cooling_rate, 1)
                ),
            '0') AS Wert,
            COALESCE(
                printf('< %.0f Stunden',
                    (SELECT value FROM meta_config WHERE key='comfort_time_reference_value')
                ),
            '') AS Grenzwert
        FROM cooling_rate
        WHERE datetime(timestamp) >= datetime('now', 'localtime')
        ORDER BY timestamp ASC
        LIMIT 1
    )

    UNION ALL

    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            'Verdichter-LZ letzte Stunde' AS Parameter,
            COALESCE(printf('%.0f Minuten', runtime_minutes_1h), '0 Minuten') AS Wert,
            COALESCE('weniger als 30 Minuten', '') AS Grenzwert
        FROM system_snapshot
        WHERE installation_id = ${anlage_id}
          AND timestamp_mez <= datetime('now','localtime')
        ORDER BY timestamp_mez DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )

    UNION ALL

    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            'Kompressorstarts letzte Stunde' AS Parameter,
            COALESCE(compressor_starts_1h, 0) AS Wert,
            COALESCE('<= 2', '') AS Grenzwert
        FROM system_snapshot
        WHERE installation_id = ${anlage_id}
          AND timestamp_mez <= datetime('now','localtime')
        ORDER BY timestamp_mez DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )

    UNION ALL

    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            'Warmwasser-Temp letzte Stunde' AS Parameter,
            COALESCE(printf('%.1f °C', dhw_temp), '0 °C') AS Wert,
            COALESCE('<= 50 Grad', '') AS Grenzwert
        FROM system_snapshot
        WHERE installation_id = ${anlage_id}
          AND timestamp_mez <= datetime('now','localtime')
        ORDER BY timestamp_mez DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )

    UNION ALL

    SELECT * FROM (
        SELECT '' AS Parameter, '' AS Wert, '' AS Grenzwert
        UNION ALL
        SELECT '' , '' , ''
    )

)

WHERE
(
    '${s_decision}' = 'EIN'
    OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM decision_logic
        WHERE action = 'HEAT_NOW'
          AND strftime('%F %H:00:00', 'now', 'localtime', '+1 hour')
              = strftime('%F %H:00:00', timestamp)
    )
)
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT *
FROM (

    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT
            'ΔT (12h) Prognose aktuell' AS Parameter,
            COALESCE(printf('%.1f °C', temp_12h - temp_now), '0 °C') AS Wert,
            COALESCE('fällt um mehr als 3 Grad', '') AS Grenzwert
        FROM weather_forecast
        WHERE datetime(timestamp) >= datetime('now', 'localtime')
        ORDER BY timestamp ASC
        LIMIT 1
    )

    UNION ALL

    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT
            'ergänzende Informationen: ' AS Parameter,
            COALESCE(char(8203), '') AS Wert,
            COALESCE(char(8203), '') AS Grenzwert
        FROM pv_window
        WHERE pv_kw > (SELECT value FROM meta_config WHERE key='pv_threshold')
          AND datetime(timestamp) >= datetime('now', 'localtime')
        ORDER BY pv_next_peak DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )

    UNION ALL

    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT
            'Komfortzeit' AS Parameter,
            COALESCE(
                printf('%.1f',
                    (SELECT value FROM meta_config WHERE key='temp_verlust_gebaeude')
                    * (SELECT value FROM meta_config WHERE key='comfort_time_reference_value')
                    / COALESCE(cooling_rate, 1)
                ),
            '0') AS Wert,
            COALESCE(
                printf('< %.0f Stunden',
                    (SELECT value FROM meta_config WHERE key='comfort_time_reference_value')
                ),
            '') AS Grenzwert
        FROM cooling_rate
        WHERE datetime(timestamp) >= datetime('now', 'localtime')
        ORDER BY timestamp ASC
        LIMIT 1
    )

    UNION ALL

    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            'Verdichter-LZ letzte Stunde' AS Parameter,
            COALESCE(printf('%.0f Minuten', runtime_minutes_1h), '0 Minuten') AS Wert,
            COALESCE('weniger als 30 Minuten', '') AS Grenzwert
        FROM system_snapshot
        WHERE installation_id = ${anlage_id}
          AND timestamp_mez <= datetime('now','localtime')
        ORDER BY timestamp_mez DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )

    UNION ALL

    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            'Kompressorstarts letzte Stunde' AS Parameter,
            COALESCE(compressor_starts_1h, 0) AS Wert,
            COALESCE('<= 2', '') AS Grenzwert
        FROM system_snapshot
        WHERE installation_id = ${anlage_id}
          AND timestamp_mez <= datetime('now','localtime')
        ORDER BY timestamp_mez DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )

    UNION ALL

    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            'Warmwasser-Temp letzte Stunde' AS Parameter,
            COALESCE(printf('%.1f °C', dhw_temp), '0 °C') AS Wert,
            COALESCE('<= 50 Grad', '') AS Grenzwert
        FROM system_snapshot
        WHERE installation_id = ${anlage_id}
          AND timestamp_mez <= datetime('now','localtime')
        ORDER BY timestamp_mez DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )

    UNION ALL

    SELECT * FROM (
        SELECT '' AS Parameter, '' AS Wert, '' AS Grenzwert
        UNION ALL
        SELECT '' , '' , ''
    )

)

WHERE
(
    '${s_decision}' = 'EIN'
    OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM decision_logic
        WHERE action = 'HEAT_NOW'
          AND strftime('%F %H:00:00', 'now', 'localtime', '+1 hour')
              = strftime('%F %H:00:00', timestamp)
    )
)

targets.queryText:
SELECT *
FROM (

    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT
            'ΔT (12h) Prognose aktuell' AS Parameter,
            COALESCE(printf('%.1f °C', temp_12h - temp_now), '0 °C') AS Wert,
            COALESCE('fällt um mehr als 3 Grad', '') AS Grenzwert
        FROM weather_forecast
        WHERE datetime(timestamp) >= datetime('now', 'localtime')
        ORDER BY timestamp ASC
        LIMIT 1
    )

    UNION ALL

    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT
            'nächster PV Peak' AS Parameter,
            COALESCE(printf('%.2f kW', pv_next_peak), '0.00 kW') AS Wert,
            COALESCE('>= 2.0 KW', '') AS Grenzwert
        FROM pv_window
        WHERE pv_next_peak > (SELECT value FROM meta_config WHERE key='pv_threshold')
          AND datetime(timestamp) >= datetime('now', 'localtime')
          AND (
              strftime('%F %T', timestamp)
              BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime')
                  AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime')
          )
        LIMIT 1
    )

    UNION ALL

    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT
            'ergänzende Informationen: ' AS Parameter,
            COALESCE(char(8203), '') AS Wert,
            COALESCE(char(8203), '') AS Grenzwert
        FROM pv_window
        WHERE pv_kw > (SELECT value FROM meta_config WHERE key='pv_threshold')
          AND datetime(timestamp) >= datetime('now', 'localtime')
        ORDER BY pv_next_peak DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )

    UNION ALL

    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT
            'Komfortzeit' AS Parameter,
            COALESCE(
                printf('%.1f',
                    (SELECT value FROM meta_config WHERE key='temp_verlust_gebaeude') * 6
                    / COALESCE(cooling_rate, 1)
                ),
            '0') AS Wert,
            COALESCE(char(8203), '') AS Grenzwert
        FROM cooling_rate
        WHERE datetime(timestamp) >= datetime('now', 'localtime')
        ORDER BY timestamp ASC
        LIMIT 1
    )

    UNION ALL

    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT
            'nächstes PV-Fenster' AS Parameter,
            COALESCE(
                printf('in ca. %.1f Stunden',
                    (julianday(timestamp) - julianday('now','localtime')) * 24.0
                ),
            '0 h') AS Wert,
            COALESCE('<= Komfortzeit', '') AS Grenzwert
        FROM pv_window
        WHERE pv_next_peak > 2
          AND datetime(timestamp) >= datetime('now', 'localtime')
          AND (
              strftime('%F %T', timestamp)
              BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime')
                  AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime')
          )
        ORDER BY timestamp ASC
        LIMIT 1
    )

    UNION ALL

    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            'Verdichter-LZ letzte Stunde' AS Parameter,
            COALESCE(printf('%.0f Minuten', runtime_minutes_1h), '0 Minuten') AS Wert,
            COALESCE('25 - 45 Minuten', '') AS Grenzwert
        FROM system_snapshot
        WHERE installation_id = ${anlage_id}
          AND timestamp_mez <= datetime('now','localtime')
        ORDER BY timestamp_mez DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )

    UNION ALL

    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            'Kompressorstarts letzte Stunde' AS Parameter,
            COALESCE(compressor_starts_1h, 0) AS Wert,
            COALESCE('<= 2', '') AS Grenzwert
        FROM system_snapshot
        WHERE installation_id = ${anlage_id}
          AND timestamp_mez <= datetime('now','localtime')
        ORDER BY timestamp_mez DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )

    UNION ALL

    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            'Warmwasser-Temp letzte Stunde' AS Parameter,
            COALESCE(printf('%.1f °C', dhw_temp), '0 °C') AS Wert,
            COALESCE('> 50 Grad', '') AS Grenzwert
        FROM system_snapshot
        WHERE installation_id = ${anlage_id}
          AND timestamp_mez <= datetime('now','localtime')
        ORDER BY timestamp_mez DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )

)

WHERE
(
    '${s_decision}' = 'EIN'
    OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM decision_logic
        WHERE action = 'HEAT_MIDDAY'
          AND strftime('%F %H:00:00', 'now', 'localtime', '+1 hour')
              = strftime('%F %H:00:00', timestamp)
    )
)

        SELECT 
            'Verdichter-LZ letzte Stunde' AS Parameter,
            COALESCE(printf('%.0f Minuten', runtime_minutes_1h), '0 Minuten') AS Wert,
            COALESCE('n/a', '') AS Grenzwert
        FROM system_snapshot
        WHERE installation_id = ${anlage_id}
          AND timestamp_mez <= datetime('now','localtime')
        ORDER BY timestamp_mez DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )

    UNION ALL

    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            'Kompressorstarts letzte Stunde' AS Parameter,
            COALESCE(compressor_starts_1h, 0) AS Wert,
            COALESCE('<= 2', '') AS Grenzwert
        FROM system_snapshot
        WHERE installation_id = ${anlage_id}
          AND timestamp_mez <= datetime('now','localtime')
        ORDER BY timestamp_mez DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )

    UNION ALL

    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            'Warmwasser-Temp letzte Stunde' AS Parameter,
            COALESCE(printf('%.1f °C', dhw_temp), '0 °C') AS Wert,
            COALESCE('> 50 Grad', '') AS Grenzwert
        FROM system_snapshot
        WHERE installation_id = ${anlage_id}
          AND timestamp_mez <= datetime('now','localtime')
        ORDER BY timestamp_mez DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )

    UNION ALL

    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT
            COALESCE(char(8203), '') AS Parameter,
            COALESCE(char(8203), '') AS Wert,
            COALESCE(char(8203), '') AS Grenzwert
        FROM pv_window
        WHERE pv_kw > 2
          AND datetime(timestamp) >= datetime('now', 'localtime')
        ORDER BY pv_next_peak DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )

    UNION ALL

    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT
            COALESCE(char(8203), '') AS Parameter,
            COALESCE(char(8203), '') AS Wert,
            COALESCE(char(8203), '') AS Grenzwert
        FROM pv_window
        WHERE pv_kw > 2
          AND datetime(timestamp) >= datetime('now', 'localtime')
        ORDER BY pv_next_peak DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )

)

WHERE
(
    '${s_decision}' = 'EIN'
    OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM decision_logic
        WHERE action = 'STABLE'
          AND strftime('%F %H:00:00', 'now', 'localtime', '+1 hour')
              = strftime('%F %H:00:00', timestamp)
    )
)

targets.queryText:
SELECT 
  CAST(strftime('%s', timestamp, 'utc') AS INTEGER) AS time,
  coalesce(cast(replace(temp_now,',', '.') as REAL), 0) * 1.0 as Außentemperatur
FROM weather_forecast
where strftime('%F %H:00:00', timestamp) between datetime(1776586522287/1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime') 
      and datetime(1776759322287/1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime')
ORDER BY time asc
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT 
  CAST(strftime('%s', timestamp, 'utc') AS INTEGER) AS time,
  coalesce(cast(replace(temp_now,',', '.') as REAL), 0) * 1.0 as Außentemperatur
FROM weather_forecast
where strftime('%F %H:00:00', timestamp) between datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime') 
      and datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime')
ORDER BY time asc
targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp as time, temp_now as value FROM weather_forecast ORDER BY timestamp;

targets.queryText:
SELECT
   cast(strftime('%s', timestamp, 'utc') as integer) as time,

   ((select value from meta_config where key = 'temp_verlust_gebaeude') * (select value from meta_config where key = 'comfort_time_reference_value'))
   /
  cooling_rate
  as 'Komfortzeit (h)'

   from cooling_rate

where strftime('%F %H:00:00', timestamp) between datetime(1776586522287/1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime') 
      and datetime(1776759322287/1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime')
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
   cast(strftime('%s', timestamp, 'utc') as integer) as time,

   ((select value from meta_config where key = 'temp_verlust_gebaeude') * (select value from meta_config where key = 'comfort_time_reference_value'))
   /
  cooling_rate
  as 'Komfortzeit (h)'

   from cooling_rate

where strftime('%F %H:00:00', timestamp) between datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime') 
      and datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime')

targets.queryText:
SELECT
  CAST(strftime('%s', timestamp_mez, 'utc') AS INTEGER) AS time,
  strftime('%H:00', timestamp_mez) as Achse, 
  runtime_minutes_1h AS 'Verdichterlaufzeit pro Stunde'
FROM system_snapshot
where installation_id = ${anlage_id} 
ORDER BY timestamp_mez desc 
Limit 12
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  CAST(strftime('%s', timestamp_mez, 'utc') AS INTEGER) AS time,
  strftime('%H:00', timestamp_mez) as Achse, 
  runtime_minutes_1h AS 'Verdichterlaufzeit pro Stunde'
FROM system_snapshot
where installation_id = ${anlage_id} 
ORDER BY timestamp_mez desc 
Limit 12
targets.rawSql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00', timestamp) as time, SUM(runtime_seconds)/3600.0 as value FROM heatpump_runtime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time;
